use_cases: Comparing before/after images in photo editing or restoration workflows
Viewing product differences in e-commerce listings
Comparing property images in real estate listings
Displaying design mockup comparisons in creative presentations
Showing image quality or enhancement differences
ai_summary: An image comparison slider component that displays two overlapping images with a draggable handle, allowing users to reveal differences between left and right images by moving the divider horizontally. Supports both mouse and touch interactions for cross-device compatibility.
